description: Cross-platform, prompt-first lifecycle hooks for the rust-coding-engine plugin shell.

hooks.prompt: If the task is Rust-heavy, classify it into exactly one primary Rust lane before acting: foundations, ownership-and-types, async-and-concurrency, architecture, interop, docs-and-quality, or production-patterns. Treat donor repos as upstream reservoirs, not runtime mirrors. Keep advice conservative, explicit, and boundary-aware.

Before stopping, verify that no donor repo was mirrored into runtime guidance, no unsafe Rust behavior was normalized casually, and the current response still respects rust-coding-engine shell boundaries, additive-only integration, and doctrine-first reasoning.
